raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/year> I found several fraudulent charges on my Citi XXXX  card from XXXX, TX ( I have never traveled to XXXX ). My Citi card online profile had been hacked, billing address was changed to : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX, a different cell phone number, and a fake email address : was created by the suspect. The security alerts were changed on my online account, and a total of : {$560.00} in fraudulent charges were made on my credit card. Citi closed this account, and then likely sent to new card to the suspect ( s ). This initial fraud was eventually corrected on or about XX/XX/year>, and the balance was refunded and a new credit card was sent to my correct address. In XX/XX/year>, I found that my account was again hacked, despite my changing the password and security settings. There were ( 2x ) fraudulent balance transfers made ( with the Citi 's fees ) for a total of : {$7300.00}. I was able to log into my online account and saw the billing address was again changed to the same as the previous fraudulent activity and my security settings were again changed. I reported this to Citi on XX/XX/year> and have made several attempts to close my account due to there negligence and incompetence. Calls to Citi 's customer service and Fraud departments go to a call center presumedly in XXXX ( which is another security concern ). I have made numerous attempts to clear this fraudulent activity and Citi 's representatives have not helped. I have since filed identity theft reports with the XXXX XXXX XXXX. I have not moved nor changed my home address, email, phone number, nor employer ( I am a XXXX XXXX XXXX ) in the past 9 years. Additionally, I rarely maintain a balance on my credit cards and have a prefect payment history for every card I currently own. The level of incompetence on the part of Fraud Investigators at Citi XXXX is incomprehensible.
